text:
マザー・クラスタの強襲から日を明けて
落ち着きを取り戻したアークスシップで
今後の相談を行っていたヒツギ達。
そこに、異常な幻創種出現の報が届く。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

マザー・クラスタの強襲から日をあけて
落ち着きを取り戻したアークスシップで
今後の相談を行っていたヒツギ達。
そこに、異常な幻創種出現の報が届く。

As calm returned to the ARKS Ship the day after
the fierce attack launched by Mother Corps.
Hitsugi and her companions discussed how to
move forward. It was then that they received
a report that an unusual species of phantasm
had been spotted in the wild.
---------------------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

As calm returned to the ARKS Ship the day after the attack
launched by Mother Corps, Hitsugi and her companions
discussed how to move forward. It was then they received a
report that an unusual species of Phantasm had been spotted.
ダーカーのような幻創種を倒せ
惑星・地球　ラスベガス
